g.text: Of Judah and Benjamin in Jerusalem
some kept the vessels of service,
brought in and out by count
some kept the furniture and the vessels of
the sanctuary: the fine flour, the wine, the oil,
sons of the priests mixed the spices
· over the things baked in pans
the singers lived in the rooms, free from
other service — employed day and night
heads of Levite households; they lived
· the father of Gibeon — he lived in…

svg.text: The house of Saul, again — 1 Chronicles 9
verse 35 — Jeiel the father of Gibeon, whose wife’s name was Maacah, lived in Gibeon with
names as spelled in the World English Bible
